page_content:
UNIV - University Courses

UNIV798 Special Topics Colloquium on University Teaching and Learning (1-3 Credits) Special topic courses directed at experienced graduate teaching assistants who are interested in university teaching and learning issues. Can be used by students for participation in the Universtiy Teaching and Learning Program. Restriction: Permission of UGST-Undergraduate Studies. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
